footer.tagline: Northern Star · CIP — structured, repeatable checks for websites and SaaS platforms.
home.hero.h1: Web Assessment for Clear, Stable and High-Performing Websites
home.hero.lead: We analyze websites, payment flows, email automations and weekly content. Focus: stability, clarity, and measurable improvements.
home.freeScan.note: Limited to 1 free scan per email per 30 days.
home.freeScan.errInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
home.freeScan.errRateLimited: You have already used a free scan for this email. Next available in {days} days.
home.freeScan.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
scan.scanning: Scan still running. {done} of {total} channels done — refresh in a moment.
scan.visibleFindingsLead: Pam shows three findings for free. Full details are locked.
scan.lockedLead: Unlock the full audit to see all findings across:
scan.upgradeH2: Upgrade to see the full audit
scan.upgradeBody: Your site has issues affecting clarity, trust, and conversion. The full audit shows all findings, impact, and recommended actions — across content, payment, email, mobile, and SEO.
scan.footerNote: Generated by Pam · free scan is limited to 1 per email per 30 days.
home.five.h2: One operational partner instead of five separate vendors
home.five.lead: Most teams stitch together a CRO agency, an SEO tool, a funnel consultant, an email auditor, and a social scheduler. We deliver all of it on a single weekly cadence — with a clean, operational, Scandinavian tone.
home.five.tagline: Five capabilities, one partner, one weekly report.
home.core.lead: A focused selection of what we ship every month.
services.lead: Six structured services, each delivered on a predictable cadence with concrete output.
how.h1: Six steps from kickoff to a weekly cadence
how.lead: The first week is hands-on — we get oriented, baseline your sites, and ship the first round of approved changes. From week two, Pam runs the cadence and you get a structured report every Friday.
how.cadence.lead: What runs when, and what triggers a human on our side.
how.principles.lead: What you can count on every week.
how.cta.h2: Want to see the format first?
how.cta.lead: The sample weekly report shows exactly what lands in your inbox every Friday.
pricing.lead: Monthly plans. Cancel anytime. Pricing in SEK.
portal.demoBanner: Demo tenant — sample data. Real data ships when Pam connects to your account.
portal.statusLine: Here's where {tenant} stands this week. Last sync: 2 minutes ago.
portal.score.label: This week's score
portal.approvals.lead: Pam suggests {n} changes. Nothing ships until you sign off.
reports.lead: Download the structured weekly report used for all client assessments. Pam publishes a new one each week.
reportDetail.placeholder: This is a placeholder report record. Once the automation is wired up, weekly reports will be written here automatically.
